title: Simon Eskildsen on scaling Shopify, building turbopuffer, and the future of databases
summary: Sualeh Asif of Cursor interviews Simon Eskildsen, CEO of turbopuffer, on scaling infrastructure at Shopify during flash sales, the cyclical emergence of new database companies, engineering principles for reliability, and the role of AI in coding. The discussion covers infrastructure team evolution, on-call practices, and challenges for database companies reaching Google-scale operations.
